Reason: The original summary did not record an immutable validated source commit as required by the evidence policy. The associated pull request was merged before the review comment identifying this defect was addressed.
ReplacementRequirement: Create a new M0 evidence summary only after the simplified contract correction is reviewed and merged. The replacement must reference the exact merged source commit and list the validation action, result, limitations, and redaction confirmation.
RedactionConfirmation: No passwords, tokens, cookies, private keys, employee content, temporary download URLs, or production-sensitive paths are included.
